compiled_state.title: Write RED unit tests for spatial_merge: visual override and designer-added/removed logic
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Write failing pytest unit tests for the spatial_merge submodule before implementation.

## testing_mode: RED — new source file, no prior coverage.

## Test Cases (Given/When/Then)
- SM-1: Given original component with spatial_hint A and Figma-derived component with spatial_hint B, when merge_spatial() runs, then output has spatial_hint B (visual override)
- SM-2: Given component with behavioral specs in tokens (Interaction Behaviors section), when merge_spatial() runs, then behavioral spec content is unchanged in output
- SM-3: Given a Figma component not in original (unmatched_new from identity_match), when merge_spatial() runs, then output includes it with tag=NEW, designer_added=True, behavioral_spec_status=INCOMPLETE
- SM-4: Given original component not in Figma (unmatched_original), when merge_spatial() runs and component has behavioral_spec_status=INCOMPLETE, then it is removed from output without warning
- SM-5: Given original component not in Figma with behavioral_spec_status=COMPLETE, when merge_spatial() runs, then it is removed from output AND a warning string is included in the return value
- SM-6: Given components with updated fills/strokes from Figma, when merge_spatial() runs, then props.fills and props.strokes reflect Figma values
- SM-7: Given component with updated text from Figma, when merge_spatial() runs, then text field reflects Figma characters value

## Files to Create
- tests/unit/test_figma_merge_spatial.py

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/unit/test_figma_merge_spatial.py exists with SM-1 through SM-7
  Verify: for t in SM-1 SM-2 SM-3 SM-4 SM-5 SM-6 SM-7; do grep -q "$t" tests/unit/test_figma_merge_spatial.py || exit 1; done
- [ ] pytest tests/unit/test_figma_merge_spatial.py exits non-zero (RED — module not yet implemented)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/unit/test_figma_merge_spatial.py; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
